label: cold_P5.4
answer:
Your last cholesterol reading from April 5, 2026 showed:

Total Cholesterol: 237 mg/dL (elevated)
LDL: 162 mg/dL (elevated)
HDL: 38 mg/dL (low)
Triglycerides: 186 mg/dL (elevated)

These numbers suggest your heart health needs attention. Your doctor has already referred you to a cardiologist about this.

Yes, you have documented allergies:

Wheat / Gluten — listed in your main allergies
Peanuts — significant allergy (Class IV) from your allergy panel in March
House dust mites — moderate sensitization (Class III)

When eating out or trying new foods, always check for wheat, gluten, and peanuts. Let any healthcare provider know about these before prescribing medications.
Not medical advice — talk to your doctor before acting on this.
